author: Nolan
message:
Update visit_beamer_frame() frame title logic (#1580)

Currently `visit_beamer_frame(...)` early returns `None` if no `\frametitle` command is found in the environment.

This PR updates `visit_beamer_frame(...)` to handle cases when there is an optional title argument e.g. `\begin{frame}{title}` or when no title is specified. A `\frametitle` command takes precedence here (as it does in latex). The optional environment argument is the fallback if no `\frametitle` is found, and if neither are present an untitled `Frame` symbol is still returned. The function has no path that can return `None`, but I have left the return type as an `Option` to match the pattern used at the call site. A helper function for extracting the title and a test to exercise the symbol name logic are provided.

author: leongross
message:
feat(definition): add goto_definition for acronym commands (#1568)

Enable goto_definition for acronym reference commands (\acrshort,
\acrlong, \acrfull, \ac, and all variants) to resolve to their
definitions (\newacronym, \DeclareAcronym).

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Hethon
message:
Respect `texlab.build.pdfDirectory` for Tectonic projects (#1562)

Use `texlab.build.pdfDirectory` instead of assuming a fixed
`build/` output directory when resolving Tectonic outputs.

Closes #1561

author: Nguyen Tri Nghia
message:
fix: refresh diagnostic when watched files change (#1553)

- route workspace/didChangeWatchedFiles through the same server-owned file reload path used by internal file watcher events
- send explicit empty diagnostic publishes for URIs whose diagnostics disappeared, so stale build-log diagnostics are cleared correctly
